label: News
description: Configure how news articles are displayed across your site.

index_page.label: Index Page
index_page.description: Settings for the main news listing page.

news_per_page.label: Items Per Page
news_per_page.description: Number of news articles shown per page.

pinned_news_id.label: Pinned News IDs
pinned_news_id.description: These articles will always be visible at the top of the listing, regardless of publication date.

layout.label: Layout
layout.description: Display articles as a vertical list or as a card grid.

show_date.label: Show Date
show_date.description: Display the publication date on each article in the listing.

news_page.label: News Page
news_page.description: Settings for individual news article pages.

show_date.label: Show Date
show_date.description: Display the publication date on the article page.

show_author.label: Show Author
show_author.description: Display the author name on the article page.

widget.label: Widget
widget.description: Settings for the news widget shown on other pages.

news_count.label: Items Count
news_count.description: Number of recent articles to show in the widget.

show_date.label: Show Date
show_date.description: Display the publication date in the widget.

show_content.label: Show Content Preview
show_content.description: Show a short text preview of each article in the widget.
